overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding a motorcycle through the outskirts of Night City, dismounting near an intersection, and exploring a marshy wilderness area with the iconic Night City sign visible on the hillside. The footage transitions from urban driving to on-foot exploration through water and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban outskirts highway transitioning from dirt to paved road

events.description: transitioning from dirt path to paved asphalt road with palm tree lining
overtaking a futuristic silver and red sports car on the right
slowing down to approach the intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle along the road, overtaking a sports car, and approaching an intersection with the Night City skyline visible

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car being overtaken by the motorcycle on the right side

entered.detail: large white stylized sign on the hillside spelling 'Night City'
tall buildings with neon advertisements and holographic billboards
tall palm trees lining the roadside with green fronds
unpaved dirt road with scattered vegetation and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person motorcycle ride on a dirt path approaching Night City, with the iconic sign visible on the hillside. The rider transitions onto a paved asphalt road lined with palm trees, overtakes a futuristic sports car, and approaches an intersection with the city's neon-lit skyline in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with traffic control and sidewalk

events.description: bringing the motorcycle to a complete stop at the intersection
dismounting the motorcycle and stepping onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: stopping the motorcycle at the intersection, dismounting, and stepping onto the sidewalk as large vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck driving past the intersection on the left

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and street lighting
yellow and black striped safety posts along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The character stops the motorcycle at a city intersection, dismounts, and stands on the sidewalk. A large truck passes by on the left while the camera captures the road barriers and traffic infrastructure, with the Night City sign now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside wilderness trail leading toward the Night City sign

events.description: leaving the paved road and entering the dirt wilderness area with tall grass
approaching the shallow stream and marsh area at the base of the hill

agents.ego_description: walking away from the urban road toward the hillside with the Night City sign, moving through grass and rocky terrain

entered.detail: dilapidated building ruins on the hillside near the sign
rocky hillside with scattered vegetation and boulders
shallow water inlet at the base of the hill with marshy banks

segments.scene_description: Leaving the road behind, the character walks through a wilderness area with tall grass and palm trees toward the Night City sign on the hillside. An abandoned structure becomes visible on the left as the terrain transitions to rocky hillside, approaching a shallow stream at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow marsh and reflective pools at the base of the Night City sign

events.description: entering the shallow marsh water and moving away from dry land
moving deeper into the water with prominent reflections of palm trees and the sun on the surface

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow marsh water toward the Night City sign, with sunlight creating dramatic reflections on the water surface

entered.detail: murky shallow water with floating vegetation and debris reflecting the sky
reddish vegetation and lily pads growing in the marsh water
reddish-brown rocky outcrops along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character wading through a shallow marsh with the Night City sign towering ahead. The water creates mirror-like reflections of the palm trees and sun. Red aquatic plants float in the marsh as the camera moves through the water toward the hillside, with the abandoned structure now visible on the left shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a high-speed ride on the outskirts of Night City into a slow trek through a reflective marshland. It begins with a motorcycle ride along a dirt path and a palm-lined asphalt road, overtaking a futuristic sports car as the neon-lit city skyline emerges in the distance. As the rider comes to a stop at a busy intersection, the camera shifts to a pedestrian perspective on the sidewalk, capturing passing trucks and road barriers while the iconic Night City sign looms closer on the hillside. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the pavement behind, walking through tall grass and past an abandoned structure toward a rocky hillside. Finally, the terrain shifts into a shallow marsh where the camera wades through water filled with red aquatic plants, moving toward the towering sign amidst mirror-like reflections of the sun and palm trees.
